description: This file contains unit tests for the 'adapter' module within the 'backend_api' package, validating mock and REST adapter creation, endpoint calls, and configuration-based adapter selection.

methods.name: createMockAdapter
methods.description: Creates a mock adapter returning sample data for testing purposes.

methods.name: createRestAdapter
methods.description: Creates a REST API adapter configured to communicate with a backend service.

methods.name: createBackendAdapter
methods.description: Factory function that selects and creates either a mock or REST backend adapter based on configuration.
